allow: Bash(node -e "const db = require\('./data/mous-visibility.json'\); console.log\('Latest collection:', JSON.stringify\(db.dailyAggregates[Object.keys\(db.dailyAggregates\).pop\(\)], null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const db = require\('./data/mous-visibility.json'\); console.log\('Total runs:', db.runs.length\); if\(db.runs.length > 0\) { console.log\('Latest run sample:', JSON.stringify\(db.runs[db.runs.length-1].results.slice\(0,2\), null, 2\)\); }")
Bash(node -e "const db = require\('./server/database'\); const data = db.getLatestData\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(data, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0, 'utf8'\)\); console.log\('Client:', d.client.name\); console.log\('Score:', d.client.overallScore + '%'\); console.log\('Competitors:', d.competitorChart.datasets.map\(x => x.label\).slice\(0,3\).join\(', '\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0\)\); console.log\('Client:', d.client.name\); console.log\('Score:', d.client.overallScore\)")
